elements.name: phi-application
elements.description:
Top-level PHI application element used in `index.html`.  Displays a splash-screen during startup
and then shows the main application page

attributes.name: min-ticks
attributes.description: Number of 1/4 second ticks to keep the splash screen displayed before moving to main application page.

properties.name: minTicks
properties.description: Number of 1/4 second ticks to keep the splash screen displayed before moving to main application page.

elements.name: phi-splash-screen
elements.description: PHI Application splash screen displayed while the application is loading.

attributes.name: ticks
attributes.description: The number of progress tick counts to display while application is loading.

properties.name: tickCount
properties.description: The number of progress tick counts to display while application is loading.

elements.description: Main application header.

value.type: { light: string; dark: string; system: string; }

elements.name: phi-na-details
elements.description:
Proxy for `sl-details` element, with:
- additional styling for the PHI application.
- a "continue" button
- `first` and `last` attributes to indicate whether this is the first or last details element in a group. Different styling is applied to these elements.

attributes.name: `summary`
attributes.description: summary text for the details element. Defaults to "Summary".

attributes.name: `open`
attributes.description: indicates whether the details element is open or closed.

attributes.name: `first`
attributes.description: set to indicate that this is the first details element in the group.

attributes.name: `last`
attributes.description: set to indicate that this is the last details element in the group.

attributes.name: `button-label`
attributes.description: label for the "continue" button. Defaults to "Continue".

events.name: phi-na-show
events.description: fired when the details element is opened.

events.name: phi-na-hide
events.description: fired when the details element is closed.

events.name: phi-na-continue
events.description: fired when the "continue" button is clicked.

elements.name: phi-na-details-group
elements.description:
Container for `phi-na-details` elements. Automatically sets the `first` and `last` attributes of the first and last `phi-na-details` elements in the group.
The `phi-na-details` element can be directly inserted into the group, or can be contained within an element in the group's shadow DOM.

properties.name: assignedDetails
properties.description: Returns the list of `phi-na-details` elements assigned to this group.

elements.name: phi-na-details-10
elements.description: Health insurance needs analysis - Prior cover details

value.type: { fund: string; name: string; fundName: string; fundShortName: string; }[]

elements.name: phi-na-details-20
elements.description: Health insurance needs analysis.

attributes.name: header
attributes.description: Enable the display of the header.

attributes.name: footer
attributes.description: Enable the display of the footer.

properties.name: header
properties.description: Enable the display of the header.

properties.name: footer
properties.description: Enable the display of the footer.

elements.name: phi-headline
elements.description: Displays a "headline" banner across the page, useful for displaying key information.

elements.name: phi-keyword-search
elements.description:
Combo-box style input for searching products.  Input is in the form of search keywords.  Eg. `hospital gold nsw family`

The component supports two modes of operation:
1. Keyword search - Entering keywords will perform a keyword search and display the results in a drop-down menu.  Selecting a result will populate the input with
the product name and display a menu of product variants (state and cover types) for the second mode of operation.
2. Product selection - Entering a product name will display a list of available variants for that product.  Selecting a variant will populate the input
with the product name and hide the drop-down menu.  The product openDetails are displayed in the product cover openDetails section.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Label text used to indicate a prompt for selecting a product.

attributes.name: search-combined
attributes.description: Include combined products in the search results.

attributes.name: search-hospital
attributes.description: Include hospital products in the search results.

attributes.name: search-extras
attributes.description: Include extras (general health) products in the search results.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disable the component.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Set the placeholder text for the input.

attributes.name: auto-keywords
attributes.description:
Keywords to be automatically added to the keywords entered by the user when performing the search.  Useful
to constrain return values to a particular state or family type.

properties.name: label
properties.description: Label text used to indicate a prompt for selecting a product.

properties.name: searchCombined
properties.description: Include combined products in the search results.

properties.name: searchHospital
properties.description: Include hospital products in the search results.

properties.name: searchExtras
properties.description: Include extras (general health) products in the search results.

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Disable the component.

properties.name: placeholder
properties.description: Set the placeholder text for the input.

properties.name: autoKeywords
properties.description:
Keywords to be automatically added to the keywords entered by the user when performing the search.  Useful
to constrain return values to a particular state or family type.

properties.name: dropDownItems
properties.description:
Represents an array of items to be displayed in a dropdown menu.
Each item is a TemplateResult, built from either a search result or a product depending
on the type of result.

properties.name: value
properties.description: Represents the currently selected product, if any.  This value is the output of the component.

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: This image URL.

attributes.name: alt
attributes.description: This image alt text.

properties.name: src
properties.description: This image URL.

properties.name: alt
properties.description: This image alt text.
